zotero.abstractNote: We propose a new approach to search over the space of molecule synthesis directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). Our approach, which we call DAG-DQN, uses a deep Q-network to learn a policy for building synthesis DAGs. The state space is defined by the set of molecules currently available, and the action space consists of applying a reaction to a subset of these molecules. We show that DAG-DQN can be used to find synthesis DAGs for molecules that are difficult to synthesize, and that it outperforms existing methods on a range of benchmarks.
zotero.conferenceName: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems

extra.Editors: H. Larochelle and M. Ranzato and R. Hadsell and M. F. Balcan and H. Lin

zotero.proceedingsTitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 33 (NeurIPS 2020)
